scripts.test: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project runiac-functions-test "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/progressionCalculator.test.js lib/test/completeRun.test.js lib/test/completeRunCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/monthlyLeaderboard.test.js lib/test/notificationDevices.test.js lib/test/notificationDispatch.test.js lib/test/notificationScheduledDispatch.test.js"
